text: When was the last time this country
zh: 这个国家上一次

text: hosted the Olympic Games?
zh: 举办奥运会是什么时候？

text: The Olympic Games will be held
zh: 奥运会将在

text: in our country in four years' time.
zh: 四年后在我们国家举行。

text: As a great many people will be
zh: 由于将有大量的人

text: visiting the country,
zh: 前来我国参观，

text: the government will be building new hotels,
zh: 政府将建造新的酒店、

text: an immense stadium,
zh: 一座巨大的体育场，

text: and a new Olympic-standard swimming pool.
zh: 以及一个符合奥运标准的新游泳池。

text: They will also be building new roads
zh: 他们还将修建新的道路

text: and a special railway line.
zh: 和一条专用铁路线。

text: The Games will be held just outside the capital
zh: 比赛将在首都郊外举行，

text: and the whole area will be called 'Olympic City'.
zh: 整个区域将被称为“奥运城”。

text: Workers will have completed the new roads
zh: 工人们将在今年年底之前

text: by the end of this year.
zh: 完成新道路的建设。

text: By the end of next year,
zh: 到明年年底，

text: they will have finished work on the new stadium.
zh: 他们将完成新体育场的建设工作。

text: The fantastic modern buildings have been designed
zh: 这些奇妙的现代建筑是由

text: by Kurt Gunter.
zh: 库尔特·冈特设计的。

text: Everybody will be watching anxiously
zh: 随着这些新建筑拔地而起，

text: as the new buildings go up.
zh: 大家都会焦急地关注着。

text: We are all very excited and are looking forward to
zh: 我们都非常激动，

text: the Olympic Games because
zh: 都在期待这届奥运会，因为

text: they have never been held before in this country.
zh: 这个国家以前从未举办过奥运会。
